title: 'We want to tax 100%' of payments from Trump 'slush fund,' Newsom says
shortDescription: 'We want to tax 100% of those proceeds,' Newsom said of payments from President Donald Trump's 'anti-weaponization' fund.

title: 'He's having a stroke': Jill Biden on Joe's disastrous 2024 debate
shortDescription: In a recent CBS News interview, former first lady Jill Biden opened up about her husband's infamous 2024 debate against Donald Trump.

title: 'Deceived.' Ex-judges ask court to investigate Trump's deal with IRS
shortDescription: Thirty-five former federal judges asked a court to investigate whether Trump's settlement with the IRS was an act of fraud against the court.

title: After Cornyn's loss, Trump's grip on the Senate is looser than ever
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is as dominant as ever over the Republican Party. His grasp on the U.S. Senate is a different story.

title: UFC Freedom 250 beginning to take shape at White House. See photos
shortDescription: The South Lawn at the White House is starting to look cage match ready. Here's a look at the venue in progress.

title: What to know on Trump's new rules for green card applicants
shortDescription: Immigration law experts say the policy change is unclear on who would be required to actually leave the United States.

title: Election-related decisions coming from Supreme Court. What to know for midterms
shortDescription: The Supreme Court may not be done disrupting this year’s elections. Here are the big decisions that are coming that could impact the midterms.

title: Trump plans to attend Knicks game, says team 'suffered for years'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he may attend a New York Knicks championship series game. His hometown team has not made the NBA Finals since 1999.

title: Trump calls Biden 'grossly incompetent' after DOJ lawsuit
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he'd "like to see" former President Joe Biden's private conversations after the latter attempted to block their release.

title: Trump claims Iran talks 'on fumes,' warns Oman
shortDescription: President Trump claims Iran wants a deal despite failed talks and warns Oman over control of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: 'Gas tax holiday?' Trump backs off pledge to suspend federal gas tax
shortDescription: President Donald Trump once said he would push for suspending the gas tax. But at the May 27 Cabinet meeting, it seemed to be far from top of mind.

title: 'I don't care about the midterms.' Trump says Iran misjudged him
shortDescription: President Trump, speaking at a Cabinet meeting on May 27, said Iran "thought they were going to outwait me" in regard to making a peace deal.

title: Next up in Trump's DC makeover? President eyes World War II Memorial
shortDescription: As renovations near completion on the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, Trump is considering similar changes to the World War II Memorial fountain.

title: Trump weighs in on Biden DOJ tape lawsuit
shortDescription: Donald Trump responds to questions about Joe Biden suing the DOJ to block release of recorded interview tapes.

title: Trump says he doesn't 'care about the midterms'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he isn't worried about the 2026 midterm elections as effects of the war in Iran threaten to hurt Republican chances.

title: Trump news, schedule and updates for May 27 from Trump Connect
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is scheduled to meet with his Cabinet today; his candidate won a Texas runoff election; and he went to the doctor yesterday.

title: Did Cornyn vote to impeach Trump? Only 3 GOP senators who did remain
shortDescription: Incumbent GOP Sen. John Cornyn lost to AG Ken Paxton for the Republican Texas primary. Trump endorsed Paxton, but not because Cornyn voted to impeach.

title: Why UFC cage on White House lawn has people referencing 'Idiocracy'
shortDescription: As a UFC arena is being built outside the White House before June's fight in the Capital, the internet is comparing it to a popular satire movie.

title: Biden sues DOJ over release of private conversations for 2017 memoir
shortDescription: In the case filed May 26, Biden "seeks to halt (DOJ’s) plan" to release his private information that was previously exempt from disclosure under FOIA.

title: Trump skipped son's wedding. Here's why we're still talking about it.
shortDescription: President Donald Trump didn't attend his son's wedding, and people are still talking about it. Experts explain why we're so obsessed.

title: Alabama pushes Supreme Court for map ruled unfair to Black voters
shortDescription: Alabama wants the Supreme Court to let it use a House map that would flip a Democratic-held seat. A lower court said the map is unfair to Black voters.

title: Former Trump AG Bondi diagnosed with thyroid cancer
shortDescription: Former AG Pam Bondi was diagnosed with cancer shortly after departing the Trump administration. She's set to return to the White House on an AI panel.

title: Trump-backed candidate traded racist jokes with extremist, screenshot shows
shortDescription: Arizona candidate Mark Lamb, who has branded himself as "America's Sheriff, exchanged racist, homophobic and misogynistic remarks, according to digital images obtained by The Arizona Republic.
